summary: Iteration 92: Tested 'FILM IN ATTESA DI RILASCIO' card removal from Dashboard (verified removed), Films popup menu ('I Miei') in mobile bottom nav with 3 options (Film, Serie TV, Anime), MyFilms page ?view= parameter handling, and CineBoard popup menu in top navbar. All 10 frontend tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: User NeoMorpheus (fandrex1@gmail.com) has unlocked studio_serie_tv and studio_anime but NOT emittente_tv. Films popup menu 'I MIEI CONTENUTI' visible only on mobile viewport (sm:hidden). CineBoard popup menu visible on all viewports from Trophy icon. Production menu shows 5 buttons with La Tua TV locked. Dashboard no longer has 'FILM IN ATTESA DI RILASCIO' card - Line 424 removed comment confirms this.

Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_05_films_popup_film_navigation: PASSED - Film option navigates to /films (default film view)
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_06_films_popup_series_navigation: PASSED - Serie TV option navigates to /films?view=series
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_08_cineboard_popup_opens: PASSED - CineBoard popup menu opens from Trophy button
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_10_cineboard_series_navigation: PASSED - CineBoard Serie TV navigates to /social?view=series
Frontend Tests (Playwright).step_12_production_menu_works: PASSED - Production menu (Produci!) opens with 5/5 buttons

features_verified.myfilms_view_parameter: VERIFIED - MyFilms.jsx handles ?view= parameter for film/series/anime views correctly
features_verified.cineboard_popup_in_navbar: VERIFIED - Trophy button opens dropdown with 3 options (Film, Serie TV, Anime)
features_verified.cineboard_film_route: VERIFIED - Navigates to /social (film rankings - CINEBOARD page)
features_verified.cineboard_series_route: VERIFIED - Navigates to /social?view=series (TREND SERIE TV page)
